overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk up a teal staircase and through an elevated pedestrian pavilion in Night City. The player ascends from street level, passes through a covered walkway, and explores a modern plaza with orange arched structures, holographic billboards, and palm trees overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: teal painted staircase ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the covered pedestrian bridge
NPC pedestrian passes close by in the narrow covered walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the teal-painted concrete stairs toward the elevated pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in formal vest walking toward camera through the covered bridge

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs painted teal with orange edge markings
tall modern building with multiple holographic advertisements and orange structural elements
vertical black metal bars forming the walls of the covered walkway
enclosed pedestrian bridge with solid roof and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a teal-painted staircase in a futuristic urban environment at night. The camera ascends the stairs, passing teal railings, and enters a covered pedestrian bridge. A pedestrian in a vest approaches and passes by in the narrow corridor. The futuristic skyscraper with illuminated billboards remains visible ahead throughout the ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian park with tree-lined walkway overlooking city street

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open-air elevated park area
turning left to follow the curved elevated pathway

agents.ego_description: walking along the open-air elevated pathway, observing the street traffic below through the railings

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees with dense foliage lining the elevated walkway
wide paved pedestrian path with teal painted railings overlooking the street
multi-lane road with moving vehicle traffic visible through the railing gaps
large architectural shelter with curved orange support beams and transparent roof

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered bridge, the scene opens into a tree-lined elevated pedestrian park with clear night sky above. The camera turns left along the paved walkway, passing mature trees on the left while overlooking a busy city street below on the right. In the distance, a distinctive orange-arched pavilion structure becomes visible as the next destination.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pavilion with orange arched beams and glass roof containing vendor kiosks

events.description: entering the orange arched pavilion structure with glass roof
moving under the glass roof where artificial lighting mixes with moonlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the modern pavilion structure, passing vendor stalls and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the palm trees under the pavilion canopy

entered.detail: large curved orange structural beams supporting the transparent roof
transparent glass panel roof with metal framework allowing moonlight through
tropical palm trees planted in planters throughout the pavilion plaza
large holographic advertisement displaying 'CIRUS' with red star and blue graphics
small commercial stalls with illuminated signage and glass fronts

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the distinctive orange-arched pavilion, walking beneath curved structural beams and a glass roof. The environment transitions to a sheltered plaza with palm trees, vendor kiosks, and prominent holographic billboards including a large 'CIRUS' advertisement. The lighting becomes a mix of artificial overhead lights and natural moonlight filtering through the glass roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: pavilion exit area with prominent advertisements and view of coastal cityscape

events.description: turning right to navigate around the Cirrus billboard toward the pavilion exit
approaching the exit of the covered pavilion back to open urban street level

agents.ego_description: continuing through the pavilion past advertisements and approaching the street level exit

entered.detail: vertical advertisement kiosk displaying 'REAL WATER' with product bottle image
distant view of foggy coastline and ocean beyond the pavilion edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the pavilion past the prominent Cirrus billboard and a Real Water advertisement kiosk. The camera turns right, approaching the exit while the orange structural elements recede behind. The futuristic skyscraper comes back into clearer view on the right as the camera nears the street level, with a glimpse of the distant foggy coastline visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow urban ascent into a sprawling, illuminated elevated plaza. It begins at the base of a teal-painted staircase, climbing past railings and through a covered pedestrian bridge where a passerby brushes past as a distant skyscraper looms ahead. As the camera exits the bridge, the scene opens into a tree-lined pedestrian park, turning left along a paved walkway that overlooks a busy city street below. The path then leads directly into a distinctive orange-arched pavilion, transitioning from the open night air to a sheltered plaza filled with palm trees, vendor kiosks, and glowing holographic billboards. Finally, the camera moves past a large Cirrus advertisement and turns right toward the exit, leaving the orange structures behind as the futuristic skyline and a distant foggy coastline come into view.
